agentSupport.notes: Trust-window resume leaf for the canonical APS loop (module 12, design change #6 / gap G8). Cheap cold resume when state is provably fresh (recency + baseline SHA + unchanged scope), durable committed run-journal, declared non-idempotent actions never auto-replayed, mid-action heartbeat, and verbatim cold-rehydration protocol. Serves aps-loop; design: plans/designs/2026-06-18-canonical-aps-loop.design.md.
